title: Sargavasantham
desc: Movie starring Chippy, Siddique, Narendra Prasad, and directed by Anil Das.

title: Akale
desc: Happiness in relationships requires love, understanding, and effort from both individuals. A lack of balance can lead to pain and heartache.

title: Krishna Gadha
desc: Krishna and Mahalakshmi love each other. A mafia gang attacks her family and kidnaps kids. Krishna must save them to win Mahalakshmi's approval.

title: Manathe Kottaram
desc: Madhavan and Chandrika, a middle-class couple, who devote their lives nurturing their children, dream of building a house and marrying off their daughters. Will their dreams come true?

title: Kudumbasree Sharada
desc: Sharada, a resilient single mom with a tough past, bravely raises her three daughters alone, pushing through societal judgments and challenges while striving for a better life for them.

title: Mangalyam
desc: A young woman with grand aspirations marries a man from a diverse background, navigating the challenges and joys of life together, creating a unique and enriching journey.

title: Chembarathi
desc: Kalyani enters into a family that's controlled by Akhilandeswari. Kalyani captures the heart of Akhilandeswari's elder son, it leads to a conflict.

title: Durga
desc: IG Durga Prasad leads a new anti-terror squad under political pressure. His probe uncovers his own brother among militants, forcing him into a tragic final showdown.

title: Manathe Kottaram
desc: Madhavan and Chandrika, a middle-class couple, who devote their lives nurturing their children, dream of building a house and marrying off their daughters. Will their dreams come true?

title: Kudumbasree Sharada
desc: Sharada, a resilient single mom with a tough past, bravely raises her three daughters alone, pushing through societal judgments and challenges while striving for a better life for them.

title: Akale
desc: Happiness in relationships requires love, understanding, and effort from both individuals. A lack of balance can lead to pain and heartache.

title: Deva Sangeetham
desc: Watch a calming spiritual trance, hear devotional songs, and glimpse different Hindu gods worshipped by devotees nationwide, offering a peaceful glimpse into traditional devotion and culture.

title: Drama Juniors S02 Golden Moments
desc: A reality show where kids aged 5-13 showcase their acting skills through fun tasks and challenges designed to groom their talent and boost their confidence.

title: Nunakkuzhi
desc: Eby, a business magnate's son, hilariously navigates a chaotic mess of lies and conflicts to retrieve his laptop, which holds an intimate video of him and his wife.
